# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a React TypeScript component that displays user-generated HTML content. Users can format posts with rich HTML (bold, links, images). Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to render the content prop. TypeScript interface should have content as string. This is for our blogging platform's post viewer component.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it to prevent XSS.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use framework-provided auto-escaping for HTML output.
- Sanitize rich text carefully before allowing it to be rendered as HTML.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not insert user input directly into HTML output without escaping.
- Do not disable escaping on untrusted content.
# Category: xss

import React from 'react';
import DOMPurify from 'dompurify';

interface PostViewerProps {
  content: string;
}

const PostViewer: React.FC<PostViewerProps> = ({ content }) => {
  const sanitizedContent = DOMPurify.sanitize(content, {
    ALLOWED_TAGS: [
      'b', 'i', 'em', 'strong', 'a', 'p', 'br', 'ul', 'ol', 'li',
      'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'img', 'blockquote',
      'pre', 'code', 'span', 'div', 'figure', 'figcaption', 'hr',
      'table', 'thead', 'tbody', 'tr', 'th', 'td', 'sub', 'sup',
      'u', 's', 'del', 'ins',
    ],
    ALLOWED_ATTR: [
      'href', 'src', 'alt', 'title', 'class', 'id', 'width', 'height',
      'target', 'rel', 'loading',
    ],
    ALLOWED_URI_REGEXP: /^(?:(?:https?|mailto):|[^a-z]|[a-z+.-]+(?:[^a-z+.\-:]|$))/i,
    ADD_ATTR: ['target'],
    FORBID_TAGS: ['script', 'style', 'iframe', 'form', 'input', 'textarea', 'select', 'button', 'object', 'embed'],
    FORBID_ATTR: ['onerror', 'onload', 'onclick', 'onmouseover', 'onfocus', 'onblur', 'onsubmit', 'onchange', 'style'],
  });

  // Force all links to open in new tab with safe rel attributes
  const parser = new DOMParser();
  const doc = parser.parseFromString(sanitizedContent, 'text/html');
  const links = doc.querySelectorAll('a');
  links.forEach((link) => {
    link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
    link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
  });
  const finalContent = doc.body.innerHTML;

  return (
    <article
      className="post-viewer"
      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: finalContent }}
    />
  );
};

export default PostViewer;
